## Scope check

sortie has hard scope boundaries (see CONTRIBUTING.md): no CAPTCHA
solving, no anti-bot evasion, no fingerprint spoofing, credentials
never reach the model. Proposals that cross these will be closed.

- [ ] This proposal stays inside those boundaries.
